_note: Per-entity governance proposal history, newest first. Every url is a real forum.arbitrum.foundation thread. Attribution audited Jul 8 2026: proposals authored by Entropy Advisors before OpCo was operational are credited to Entropy (by the forum-account that posted them), not OpCo. For Security Council these are its decisions/emergency actions.

foundation.title: Continued Funding for the Arbitrum Foundation
foundation.one_line: $16M in RWAs/stables, 1,740 ETH and 230M ARB to fund the Foundation through 2027.

foundation.title: 2025 Transparency Report: The Year of Institutional Adoption
foundation.one_line: Sixth transparency report: 2025 spend, milestones and institutional adoption.

foundation.title: A Vision for the Future of Arbitrum
foundation.one_line: Foundation plan introducing the Arbitrum Aligned Entities (AAE) framework.

foundation.title: 2024 Transparency Report
foundation.one_line: 2024 Foundation spend and 276 funded projects disclosed.

foundation.title: Funds to Bolster the Foundation's Strategic Partnerships Budget
foundation.one_line: 250M ARB for large strategic ecosystem and RWA/TradFi partnerships.

foundation.title: Transparency Report 2023
foundation.one_line: Inaugural report: over $23M spent, 50+ projects funded in 10 months.

foundation.title: Licensing the Arbitrum tech stack to strategic partners (RFC)
foundation.one_line: Foundation feedback thread on licensing the Arbitrum stack (AEP) to new partners.

foundation.title: AIP-1.2: Foundation and DAO Governance
foundation.one_line: Amends the Constitution and lowers the proposal threshold to 1M ARB.

foundation.title: AIP-1.1: Lockup, Budget, Transparency
foundation.one_line: Locks the Foundation's 700M ARB over 4 years and sets its budget + reporting.

foundation.title: AIP-1: Arbitrum Improvement Proposal Framework
foundation.one_line: The first DAO proposal; rejected and split into AIP-1.1 and AIP-1.2.

offchain.title: AIP Fast Feed
offchain.one_line: Paid transaction-ordering data feed, 97% of revenue to the DAO treasury.

offchain.title: Transition Arbitrum One ordering to Priority Gas Auctions (PGA)
offchain.one_line: Proposes replacing Timeboost with fee-based priority gas auction ordering.

offchain.title: ArbOS 61 Elara
offchain.one_line: ArbOS upgrade raising the Stylus size limit and OCL base-fee delegation.

offchain.title: ArbOS 31 Bianca: Stylus, RIP-7212, Nova Fee Router
offchain.one_line: Activates Stylus, secp256r1 support and Nova fee router changes.

offchain.title: Adopt Timeboost transaction ordering
offchain.one_line: Adopts the express-lane MEV auction for transaction ordering.

offchain.title: BOLD: permissionless validation
offchain.one_line: Upgrades to the BOLD dispute protocol enabling permissionless validation.

offchain.title: Activate Stylus (ArbOS 30)
offchain.one_line: Activates the Stylus VM enabling Rust/C++ contracts alongside the EVM.

offchain.title: ArbOS 20 Atlas
offchain.one_line: Adds EIP-4844 blob support and Dencun features.

opco.title: Code of Conduct: AI-participation amendment
opco.one_line: Proposed forum rules for responsible AI-generated governance participation.

opco.title: Watchdog program operations
opco.one_line: Runs the bounty program that rewards reports of grant misuse.

opco.title: OAT June 2026 Elections Overview
opco.one_line: Second annual re-election of OpCo's 5-member oversight committee, run by OpCo.

opco.title: Firestarters research grants
opco.one_line: Funds small research projects that test ideas before full DAO proposals.

opco.title: Rewarding Active Delegates (RAD) program
opco.one_line: The program that pays active DAO voters each month; run by OpCo.

opco.title: Updating the OpCo Foundation's Operational Capability
opco.one_line: OAT council + Foundation loosen OpCo contracting, spending and comp limits.

entropy.title: Extending DRIP's Mandate
entropy.one_line: Extends DRIP incentive program end date to July 2027, no new funding.

entropy.title: Transfer 6,000 ETH + idle stablecoins to the Treasury Portfolio
entropy.one_line: Entropy-authored move of idle 6K ETH plus USDC into ATMC strategies.

entropy.title: Code of Conduct & DAO Procedures as Living Documents
entropy.one_line: Makes the Code of Conduct and Procedures permanent living documents maintained by OpCo.

entropy.title: Automate Consolidation of Idle Funds into the Portfolio
entropy.one_line: Auto-routes idle non-ARB program funds to the ATMC treasury portfolio.

entropy.title: Data Dashboards Catalog
entropy.one_line: Index of Entropy's Dune dashboards for treasury, governance and protocols.

entropy.title: Transfer 8,500 ETH to ATMC's ETH Treasury Strategies
entropy.one_line: Entropy-proposed deployment of 8,500 ETH into ATMC yield strategies.

entropy.title: Consolidate Idle USDC to ATMC Stablecoin Balance
entropy.one_line: Moves ~2.5M idle USDC (Events Budget, ARDC leftovers) to ATMC yield strategies.

entropy.title: Updating the Code of Conduct & DAO's Procedures
entropy.one_line: Second trial of the revised Code of Conduct and procedures through January 2026.

entropy.title: Entropy Advisors: Exclusively Working with the DAO, Y2-Y3
entropy.one_line: Two-year renewal: $3M/year plus up to 15M ARB in vesting + milestones.

entropy.title: Reallocate Redeemed USDM Funds to STEP 2 Budget
entropy.one_line: Redirects ~$3.5M redeemed USDM into approved STEP 2 RWA allocations.

entropy.title: ATMC: Consolidating Efforts
entropy.one_line: Entropy-authored merge of the TMC, GMC and STEP committees into the unified ATMC.

entropy.title: Wind Down the MSS
entropy.one_line: Sunsets the Multisig Support Service, moves payment processing to the Arbitrum Foundation.

entropy.title: STEP 2 Committee Preferred Allocations
entropy.one_line: Ratifies the committee's 35M ARB allocation across BENJI, WTGXX and USTBL RWA products.

entropy.title: DeFi Renaissance Incentive Program (DRIP)
entropy.one_line: Entropy-designed 80M ARB DeFi incentive program; Entropy runs the execution.

entropy.title: Strategic Objectives (SOS submission)
entropy.one_line: Entropy's proposed DAO strategic objectives on efficiency, finance and growth.

entropy.title: OAT Elections (first term)
entropy.one_line: Entropy ran the first OAT council election, before OpCo had its own staff.

entropy.title: OAT Applications & Nominations
entropy.one_line: Entropy opened the OAT candidate application and nomination process, pre-OpCo.

entropy.title: Arbitrum Strategic Objective Setting (SOS)
entropy.one_line: Framework for the DAO to propose and vote on interim strategic objectives.

entropy.title: The Watchdog: Grant Misuse Bounty Program
entropy.one_line: 400K ARB bounty program rewarding whistleblowers who report grant misuse.

entropy.title: OpCo: A DAO-adjacent Entity for Strategy Execution
entropy.one_line: Entropy-designed structural proposal that created OpCo, the DAO's execution arm.

entropy.title: Unifying Arbitrum's Mission, Vision, Purpose (MVP)
entropy.one_line: Ratifies DAO-wide mission, vision and purpose statements.

entropy.title: Delegate Code of Conduct + Formalizing DAO Operations
entropy.one_line: Adopts a delegate Code of Conduct and operational standards for a 6.5-month trial.

entropy.title: DAO Events Budget for 2025
entropy.one_line: Establishes a 2025 events budget with a 3-member evaluation group.

entropy.title: Fund The Stylus Sprint
entropy.one_line: 5M ARB grant program for building with Stylus (Rust/C/C++ contracts).

entropy.title: COI & Self-Voting Policies
entropy.one_line: Temp check approving disclosure and responsible-voting policies for delegates.

entropy.title: Default Shielded Voting for Snapshot Votes?
entropy.one_line: Proposed defaulting Snapshot votes to shielded voting; the DAO voted against.

entropy.title: Entropy Advisors: Exclusively Working With Arbitrum DAO
entropy.one_line: Founding mandate: $2.47M/year plus 1.5M ARB, exclusive advisory role.

entropy.title: Improving Predictability in DAO Operations
entropy.one_line: Sets a regular weekly cadence and guidelines for posting Snapshot/Tally votes.

entropy.title: Adjusting Arbitrum's Gas Fees
entropy.one_line: Proposed raising the L2 minimum base fee from 0.01 to 0.03-0.05 gwei; never went to a vote.

entropy.title: Arbitrum Multi-sig Support Service (MSS)
entropy.one_line: Creates a 600K ARB unified multisig signer service replacing fragmented program multisigs.

atmc.title: Automate Consolidation of Idle Funds into the Portfolio
atmc.one_line: Auto-routes surplus non-ARB funds from finished programs into the portfolio.

atmc.title: Investment Policy Statement (Q4 2025)
atmc.one_line: Sets allocation targets and the risk framework for treasury investments.

atmc.title: Transfer 8,500 ETH to ATMC's ETH Treasury Strategies
atmc.one_line: Funds ATMC's ETH yield strategies from idle sequencer/Timeboost revenue.

atmc.title: ATM Council Details
atmc.one_line: Defines ATMC: OAT votes, Entropy executes, OpCo comms, Foundation custody.

atmc.title: ATMC: Consolidating Efforts
atmc.one_line: Merges the TMC, GMC and STEP committees into one unified ATMC.

atmc.title: RFP: Treasury Management Services
atmc.one_line: Solicits providers to manage the pre-ATMC treasury portfolio.

atmc.title: Treasury Management v1.2
atmc.one_line: Creates the original Treasury and Growth Management Committees.

atmc.title: Stable Treasury Endowment Program (STEP)
atmc.one_line: Creates STEP, the RWA-investing program later merged into ATMC.

oat.title: OAT June 2026 Elections Overview
oat.one_line: OAT's second election: applications, eligibility review, pitch calls, vote.

oat.title: OAT Term & Next Elections
oat.one_line: Resolves the first-term end date and schedules the next election.

oat.title: Updating the OpCo Foundation's Operational Capability
oat.one_line: Expands OAT/OpCo powers: contracting, comp pool, conflict handling.

securitycouncil.title: Emergency fix: L1 Timelock renounceRole vulnerability
securitycouncil.one_line: Patched a Timelock access-control bug that could have halted constitutional proposals; no funds at risk.

securitycouncil.title: KelpDAO exploit: froze 30,766 ETH (~$71M)
securitycouncil.one_line: First-ever use of its freeze power; the ETH was later released toward an Aave/KelpDAO-led rsETH recovery.

securitycouncil.title: Emergency Stylus stack-depth fix
securitycouncil.one_line: 11-of-12 in ~2 hours to fix a Stylus chain deviation on Sepolia; applied to One + Nova precautionarily.

securitycouncil.title: Emergency Nitro/Stylus upgrade (ArbOS 32)
securitycouncil.one_line: Patched Stylus vulnerabilities that could crash nodes; no user funds affected.

securitycouncil.title: Emergency Action Transparency Report
securitycouncil.one_line: Formal report documenting the reasoning behind the ArbOS 32 emergency upgrade.
